headline: Loop Capital Initiates Coverage On Corpay with Buy Rating, Announces Price Target of $406
summary: Loop Capital  analyst Dominick Gabriele   initiates coverage on Corpay (NYSE:CPAY) with a Buy rating and announces Price Target of $406.
